purpose: Projects raw Go data-plane runtime counts into operator-facing status reports. Owns the shared Report type consumed by CLI and HTTP admin surfaces. Provides the Reader interface that storage backends implement.
exported_functions: LoadReport(ctx context.Context, reader Reader, asOf time.Time, opts Options) (Report, error)
health_states: progressing — work remains queued or in flight
degraded — dead-letter or failed items exist
stalled — overdue claims or backlog with no in-flight work for StallAfter duration
flow_lanes: projector — projector stage counts and queue pressure
reducer — reducer stage counts and top domain backlog
consumers: internal/query — HTTP admin handler wraps NewHTTPHandler
CLI — pcg status command reads RenderText/RenderJSON output
key_invariants: JSON shapes are operator contract — changes must be coordinated with CLI reference and runtime admin docs
QueueFailureSnapshot values are status-payload only — must not be promoted to metric labels
Report.Health is derived from QueueSnapshot and generationTotals; evaluateHealth encodes the health state machine
DomainBacklogs are capped at Options.DomainLimit (default 5) to prevent unbounded output
QueueBlockage rows encode conflict-domain-blocked work without exposing high-cardinality keys in metrics
CoordinatorSnapshot is additive and optional — nil when the workflow coordinator is not wired
RetryPolicySummary is attached via WithRetryPolicies decorator; no Postgres persistence
GenerationTransitionSnapshot is straight from the status store — no derivation
